## Purpose

Describe the Skill or Command and the project-development problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_skills.py`.
- [ ] I tested activation or command execution in a clean environment.
- [ ] I updated documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` when required.
- [ ] I verified that no credentials, internal hosts, private source, customer data, or non-public business information is included.
- [ ] I reviewed all scripts and external links included by this change.

## Compatibility

List the tested agents and minimum versions, if relevant.
